title: CodexOptionsReview
description: Schema for Codex's independent review of Claude's proposed options or recommended approach. Codex evaluates each option, makes its own pick, and surfaces concerns Claude's analysis missed.

verdict.description: AGREE: Codex picks Claude's option for substantively the same reasons. PARTIAL: same option but materially different reasoning, OR a close call between two viable options. DISAGREE: Codex picks a different option (including 'none-of-the-above').

summary.description: One short paragraph: Codex's read of the situation and where it agrees / diverges from Claude's framing.

option_assessments.description: Per-option assessment for each approach Claude proposed.

option_label.description: Label/identifier of the option as Claude described it (e.g. 'Option A', or the heading Claude used).

chosen_option.description: The option Codex would pick. Use 'none-of-the-above' if Codex thinks Claude missed a better path; describe that path in 'reasoning'.

claude_pick.description: What Claude recommended (option label, or 'no-recommendation' if Claude only listed options without picking).

delta.description: If matches_codex is false, the substantive disagreement; null if they match.

missed_concerns.description: Trade-offs, risks, or alternatives Codex saw that Claude's analysis did not surface. Empty array if none.
